interfaces.name: DayRecord
interfaces.signature: @Model final class DayRecord { @Attribute(.unique) var dayID: String; var monthID: String; var scanState: DayScanState; var selectedCandidateAssetID: String?; var selectedTrimStartSeconds: Double?; var selectedTrimDurationSeconds: Double?; var candidates: [ScoredCandidate]; var updatedAt: Date }
interfaces.notes: dayID/monthID derived from asset capture-timezone metadata, not device clock. candidates stored newest-scored first, pre-ranked descending by score.

interfaces.name: MonthRecord
interfaces.signature: @Model final class MonthRecord { @Attribute(.unique) var monthID: String; var renderCacheKey: String?; var renderedFileRelativePath: String?; var ceremonySeen: Bool; var remoteURL: URL?; var syncState: SyncState; var updatedAt: Date }
interfaces.notes: renderedFileRelativePath is relative to Application Support/Reels/. remoteURL/syncState are dormant fields for future cloud sync; syncState defaults to .localOnly.

interfaces.name: ScoredCandidate
interfaces.signature: struct ScoredCandidate: Codable { let assetLocalIdentifier: String; let rank: Int; let totalScore: Double; let saliencyScore: Double; let faceBonus: Double; let sharpnessScore: Double; let durationSeconds: Double; let exclusionReason: CandidateExclusionReason? }
interfaces.notes: Persisted as a Codable blob on DayRecord (SwiftData externally-stored attribute), not a separate @Model, since it's always read/written as a whole ordered array.

interfaces.name: CandidateExclusionReason
interfaces.signature: enum CandidateExclusionReason: String, Codable { case corrupted, unsupportedCodec, belowDurationFloor, screenRecordingOrImported }
interfaces.notes: Excluded candidates are retained in the array (not dropped) so 'why was this skipped' is inspectable in Settings' skip-reason disclosure.

interfaces.name: DayScanState
interfaces.signature: enum DayScanState: String, Codable { case notScanned, scanning, waitingForICloud, scanned, deferred }
interfaces.notes: Persisted scan-pipeline state. Distinct from the UI-facing DayCellState, which folds this together with live PHAsset visibility and library-access checks.

interfaces.name: SyncState
interfaces.signature: enum SyncState: String, Codable { case localOnly, pendingUpload, synced }
interfaces.notes: Unused in MVP beyond .localOnly; exists so a future cloud phase needs no schema migration.

interfaces.name: SwapAllowanceState
interfaces.signature: @Model final class SwapAllowanceState { var lastSwapDate: Date?; var swapsUsedSinceReset: Int }
interfaces.notes: Singleton row. Free tier: 1 swap per rolling real-world day (resets at local midnight), enforced app-wide, not per DayRecord. Named assumption — not explicitly resolved in earlier phases.

interfaces.name: DayCellState
interfaces.signature: enum DayCellState: Equatable { case hasPick(thumbnailAssetID: String); case empty; case scanning; case waitingForICloud(progress: Double); case deferred; case limitedLibraryExcluded }
interfaces.notes: Pure function output: dayCellState(record: DayRecord?, libraryVisibility: LibraryVisibility) -> DayCellState. Precedence rule: limitedLibraryExcluded always wins over any scanState-derived case.

interfaces.name: LibraryVisibility
interfaces.signature: enum LibraryVisibility: Equatable { case fullAccess; case limited(visibleDayIDs: Set<String>); case denied }
interfaces.notes: Computed from PHPhotoLibrary.authorizationStatus(for:) plus, for .limited, the actual set of dayIDs reachable given the user's selected-photos picker choices.

interfaces.name: Route
interfaces.signature: enum Route: Hashable { case dayDetail(dayID: String); case monthReel(monthID: String); case archive; case settings; case exportPreview(monthID: String) }
interfaces.notes: Drives a single NavigationStack(path:) rooted at the Home Calendar; no TabView.

interfaces.name: PaywallTrigger
interfaces.signature: enum PaywallTrigger: Equatable { case swapLimitReached; case lockedArchiveMonth(monthID: String); case cleanExportAttempted(monthID: String) }
interfaces.notes: ContextualPaywallSheet is parameterized by this; never a single generic sheet.

interfaces.name: SubscriptionTier
interfaces.signature: enum SubscriptionTier: Equatable { case free; case subscribed(expiresRenews: Date?) }
interfaces.notes: Derived live from StoreKit 2 Transaction.currentEntitlements; never persisted as source of truth.

interfaces.name: PhotoKitGateway
interfaces.signature: protocol PhotoKitGateway { func authorizationStatus() -> LibraryVisibility; func requestAuthorization() async -> LibraryVisibility; func fetchDayIDs(in monthID: String) async -> [String]; func fetchCandidateAssets(forDayID dayID: String) async -> [CandidateInput]; func requestICloudDownload(assetLocalIdentifier: String) -> AsyncStream<DownloadProgress>; func deleteTemporaryDownload(assetLocalIdentifier: String) async; func assetExists(assetLocalIdentifier: String) async -> Bool }
interfaces.notes: assetExists backs the source-deleted graceful-degradation checks in Day Detail and swap.

interfaces.name: CandidateInput
interfaces.signature: struct CandidateInput { let assetLocalIdentifier: String; let durationSeconds: Double; let creationDate: Date; let timeZoneIdentifier: String; let sourceType: PHAssetSourceType }
interfaces.notes: sourceType used to exclude screen recordings / imported (non-camera) assets from candidacy per detailed_discussion.

interfaces.name: DownloadProgress
interfaces.signature: enum DownloadProgress { case downloading(fraction: Double); case ready; case timedOut; case failed(Error) }
interfaces.notes: timedOut maps to DayScanState.deferred, never a silent hang or a hard failure.

interfaces.name: VisionScorer
interfaces.signature: protocol VisionScorer { func score(candidate: CandidateInput, sampledPixelBuffers: [CVPixelBuffer]) async throws -> ScoredCandidate; func bestTrimWindow(for assetLocalIdentifier: String, durationCapSeconds: Double) async throws -> (start: Double, duration: Double) }
interfaces.notes: Saliency via VNGenerateAttentionBasedSaliencyImageRequest, face bonus via VNDetectFaceRectanglesRequest, sharpness hand-computed (Laplacian variance) via Accelerate — face presence never gates the score.

interfaces.name: ReelRenderer
interfaces.signature: protocol ReelRenderer { func cacheKey(for plan: MonthRenderPlan) -> String; func render(plan: MonthRenderPlan) async throws -> ReelRenderResult }
interfaces.notes: cacheKey is a SHA256 (CryptoKit) hash over ordered (dayID, assetID, trimStart, trimDuration) tuples; render only invoked when key differs from MonthRecord.renderCacheKey.

interfaces.name: MonthRenderPlan
interfaces.signature: struct MonthRenderPlan { let monthID: String; let dayPlans: [DayRenderPlan]; let includeWatermark: Bool }
interfaces.notes: dayPlans ordered chronologically; days with no pick are simply absent from the array.

interfaces.name: DayRenderPlan
interfaces.signature: struct DayRenderPlan { let dayID: String; let assetLocalIdentifier: String; let trimStartSeconds: Double; let trimDurationSeconds: Double }
interfaces.notes: Reconstructs CMTimeRange at render time from the two Double fields.

interfaces.name: ReelRenderResult
interfaces.signature: struct ReelRenderResult { let fileRelativePath: String; let cacheKey: String; let durationSeconds: Double }
interfaces.notes: fileRelativePath is written into MonthRecord.renderedFileRelativePath on success only; failure never overwrites a prior good file.

interfaces.name: DayFrameError
interfaces.signature: enum DayFrameError: Error { case iCloudTimeout; case sourceAssetDeleted; case exportFailed(underlying: Error); case storageInsufficient; case noCandidatesRemaining; case swapLimitReached }
interfaces.notes: Single shared error vocabulary consumed by all view models so error-state UI text stays consistent across screens.

interfaces.name: DayFrameStore
interfaces.signature: @MainActor protocol DayFrameStore { func dayCellStates(forMonthID monthID: String) -> [String: DayCellState]; func dayRecord(forDayID dayID: String) -> DayRecord?; func swapToNextCandidate(dayID: String) throws; func monthRecord(monthID: String) -> MonthRecord?; func requestReelRender(monthID: String) async throws -> ReelRenderResult; func markCeremonySeen(monthID: String) }
interfaces.notes: Facade every view model reads/writes through; delegates persistence to ScanCoordinator's background ModelActor. View models never import PhotoKit/Vision/AVFoundation directly.

interfaces.name: ScanCoordinator
interfaces.signature: actor ScanCoordinator { func runBackfill(priorityMonthID: String) async; func resumeInterrupted() async; func handleICloudRetry(dayID: String) async }
interfaces.notes: Owns the background ModelActor for all SwiftData writes during scanning; foreground/active-session driven, with BGProcessingTask as opportunistic top-up only, not primary mechanism.

interfaces.name: EntitlementStore
interfaces.signature: @MainActor @Observable final class EntitlementStore { private(set) var tier: SubscriptionTier; func refresh() async; func purchase(productID: String) async throws; func restorePurchases() async throws }
interfaces.notes: Wraps StoreKit 2 Transaction.currentEntitlements listener; no server component; lapses gate access in UI only, never trigger file deletion.

interfaces.name: TempFileJanitor
interfaces.signature: func cleanOrphanedTempFiles(applicationSupportURL: URL) async
interfaces.notes: Run once on launch before any UI reads render state; deletes anything under Application Support/tmp/ left from a killed export or iCloud fetch.

interfaces.name: BackgroundBackfillScheduler
interfaces.signature: func registerBackgroundTasks(); func scheduleOpportunisticBackfill()
interfaces.notes: BGProcessingTask registration; explicitly best-effort per ios_architecture_review — must not be relied on for guaranteed overnight completion.

interfaces.name: ReelReadyNotifier
interfaces.signature: func scheduleReelReadyNotification(monthID: String, dayCount: Int) async
interfaces.notes: Local UNUserNotificationCenter notification only; should-have, not blocking must-have activation path.
